name: Qwen2.5-Max
note: Large proprietary MoE pretrained on 20T+ tokens; API model id qwen-max-2025-01-25, competitive with DeepSeek V3.

results.notes: From the 'Base Models Benchmarks' section of the article, distinct from the already-tracked Instruct-model benchmarks (Arena-Hard/MMLU-Pro/GPQA/LiveCodeBench). Transcribes the official qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen2.5-max/ base-model comparison chart (vs DeepSeek-V3-Base, Llama-3.1-405B, Qwen2.5-72B); the official blog's chart is image-only so cannot be text-verified directly, but the figure is independently corroborated verbatim by a second transcription on gocodeo.com/post/all-you-need-to-know-about-qwen2-5-max.

LMArena (Chatbot Arena/Arena.ai) Text leaderboard Elo rating for model id 'qwen2.5-max', rank #156 as of this July 2026 live fetch, +/-4 CI, listed as proprietary/Alibaba. This is the model's now-dated standing after ~18 months of newer frontier models were added to the arena; not comparable in magnitude to the much higher score tracked under the same slug for the newer Qwen3-Max.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real; blog qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen2.5-max/ byline gives Jan 28 2025 (matches record; a secondary source said Jan 29, byline is authoritative), confirms closed/proprietary large-scale MoE pretrained on 20T+ tokens, API id qwen-max-2025-01-25, and that it beats DeepSeek V3 on Arena-Hard/LiveBench/LiveCodeBench/GPQA-Diamond. artificialanalysis.ai confirms 32K context and closed weights. DashScope pricing confirmed at $1.60/$6.40 per 1M input/output tokens. All 5 result rows verified verbatim on datacamp.com/blog/qwen-2-5-max. 'deprecated' status could not be confirmed via an explicit official deprecation notice -- it is a reasonable inference given Alibaba has since shipped Qwen3-Max/3.5/3.6/3.7-Max, but some third-party docs still list qwen-max-2025-01-25 as accessible; flagging this as lower-confidence than the other fields.
